title: Meet the Man Who Changed Gods Forever! #ramayana #jaishreeram #indianart #indianhistory #kerala
description:
Did you know the visual identity of Indian Gods we see today was established long before television? While Ramanand Sagar’s Ramayana is legendary, the "human" face of Indian divinity was actually the work of the visionary artist, Raja Ravi Varma.

In this video, we explore:

~ How Ravi Varma moved away from rigid carvings to realistic oil paintings.

~ The influence of European techniques on Indian traditional themes.

~ The story of his Lithographic Press in 1894 that made art accessible to every household.

~ His massive influence on Dadasaheb Phalke and the birth of Indian Cinema.

Raja Ravi Varma didn’t just paint; he created a visual language that united a subcontinent. Whether it’s the calendar in your home or the look of a modern mythological film, his brushstrokes are everywhere.

Subscribe for more deep dives into Indian history, art, and culture!

#IndianHistory #RajaRaviVarma #IndianMythology #ArtHistory #Dadasaheb Phalke #CulturalHeritage #EvolutionOfArt
